creator: bmah@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have some data that may be useful.  I've been experiencing
similar problems on 4-STABLE for awhile.  Logs of my latest buildworld/
buildkernel/installworld (4.2-STABLE) can be found at:

http://people.freebsd.org/~bmah/world/

In particular, please see:

http://people.freebsd.org/~bmah/world/installworld.out

Thanks!

Bruce.
